description: An R&D chemist needs to create the official quality specification for a new product that is moving from development to commercialization.

nodes.task_description: Create a new specification document in the quality management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a new spec document linked to the product code.

nodes.task_description: Define the quality attributes to be tested (e.g., Purity, Water Content, Color).

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds the required tests to the specification.

nodes.task_description: For each attribute, define the test method to be used and the acceptable range (e.g., 'Purity, Method GC-101, NLT 99.5%'). Submit for approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent defines the limits for each test and submits the new specification into the approval workflow.
